name: Step 3.7 Flash
archDisplay: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts with 1.8B vision encoder + 196B language backbone, 198B total / 11B active
note: Newest StepFun release (successor to Step 3.5 Flash), adding native multimodal (image/GUI/document) support that the text-only Step 3.5 Flash lacked. Not previously in corpus (corpus's newest StepFun entry is Step-3 from 2025-07-31). No shipped 'Step 4' flagship found -- only reported as in training.

results.notes: Note: this is the Artificial Analysis composite Intelligence Index (30), not a GPQA-specific figure -- no single-benchmark independent score could be verified for this exact model.

verificationNotes: Artificial Analysis independently scored the Intelligence Index at 30 (#34/94); no independently-verified GPQA/LiveCodeBench numbers located for this specific model (only for the prior Step 3.5 Flash), so composite index is the only result reported.
